chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-451 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 2107/25 3.For hearing of main case 30-04-2025 Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w I.O/SIP Zahoor Phull of P.S, Sobhodero. **** Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate files Vakalatnama and statement on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. Statements filed by respondents No.2&4 are also taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. I.O is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in terms of section 161 CrPC. who in her statement has not supported the contents of FIR. He further submits that after going through the statement, he is of the opinion that the case is to be disposed of under C-class. After such a statement, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with pending application(s) with directions to I.O to submit such report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days. Meanwhile, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
